steps.title: Cryptography and Go Predict Crypto Go Transform Distinction · Theory Crypto Go Transform Distinction
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory cryptographic engineering team handles case 1085 during a signed release review. Build deterministic Go evidence to separate encoding, hashing, authentication, confidentiality, reversibility, and canonical domain-bound bytes; keep browser execution deterministic and move production entropy, native timing, non-allowlisted crypto, network, HSM, and compliance claims to authorized transfer gates; then double attacker-controlled size or work and remain inside the admission budget. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Distinguish encoding, checksums, hashing, MACs, signatures, encryption, key agreement, KEMs, and password hashing by purpose and reversibility.
